note: Compound v2 Comptroller. Users call the Unitroller proxy (0x3d98..Cd3B); the snapshot is the Comptroller impl ABI (0xbafe01ff..). COVER = enterMarkets/exitMarket/claimComp(3 overloads). *Allowed/*Verify are internal hooks invoked by cToken contracts; _set*/governance excluded.

0xc2998238.name: enterMarkets
0xc2998238.reason: user position: enable cTokens as collateral (Lending::EnableCollateral)

0xede4edd0.name: exitMarket
0xede4edd0.reason: user position: disable a cToken as collateral (Lending::DisableCollateral)

0xe9af0292.name: claimComp
0xe9af0292.reason: user reward claim: claim accrued COMP for a holder across all markets (Airdrop::Claim)

0x1c3db2e0.name: claimComp
0x1c3db2e0.reason: user reward claim: claim COMP for a holder in specific cTokens (Airdrop::Claim)

0x6810dfa6.name: claimComp
0x6810dfa6.reason: user reward claim: batch claim COMP (holders x cTokens, borrowers/suppliers) (Airdrop::Claim)

0x741b2525.name: updateContributorRewards
0x741b2525.reason: permissionless COMP contributor-accrual flush; moves no caller funds, grants no permission

0xda3d454c.reason: internal protocol hook; called by cToken contracts (not an EOA), enforces policy/accounting
